rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GERARDO SORRENTINO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/29/25. Counsel has not yet responded to the following issues emailed to him on 12/3/24: (1) Why are the decedent's wife's heirs getting only ¼ of the real property sale proceeds and the BoA MM savings account? (2) How was the pro rata share of the statutory fee and costs calculated? (3) Should the fractions not have been changed in Exhibit C to the second supplement? Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE TRAYLOR TRUST, DATED MAY 3, 1996, AS PURPORTEDLY AMENDED AND RESTATED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Surcharge Of Trustee Based On Breach Of Fiduciary Duties Suspension And Removal Of Trustee, And Appointment Of Sheila Hicks As Successor Trustee Order Compelling Pre-Death Accounting Imposition Of A Constructive Trust Order Prohibiting Trustee From Using Trust Funds To Defend Petition Order Awarding Attorney'S Fees And
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SHEN-FU HSIEH
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/27/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) There is no Attachment 7 to the petition, setting forth the facts upon which the petitioner bases the allegation that the property should pass or be confirmed to the petitioner. (4) Item 9 of the petition is supposed to include the relationship to the decedent of the person listed. (5) A copy of the deed must be filed to show how title is currently vested. (6) Attachments 7a and 7b should be each person's one-half interest, not the entire property. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any new papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 1/13/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
